summary: Added a local-only durable review resolution path on top of the completed Review Studio demo flow. Review comments can now be resolved through the local repository/API with accepted, rejected, needs_material, or resolved status, write audit events, and persist review-derived eval cases for missing citation and wrong-risk paths.
contractsChanged: Review log to eval-ready record derivation
Local aletheia_eval_cases persistence from review resolution
AletheiaReviewRecord resolution status API client fields
testsRun: cd frontend && npx eslint src/aletheia/reviewStudio.ts src/aletheia/AletheiaWorkspace.tsx tests/reviewStudio.test.ts
cd frontend && npx playwright test tests/review-studio-demo.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts --project=desktop-chromium
risks: The new durable path is local-only SQLite/API state; Supabase remains explicitly unsupported for review resolution and review-derived eval persistence.
Review Studio UI still needs a follow-up wiring step to call the new resolution API directly from reviewer controls.
The Playwright proof covers desktop Chromium; mobile layout is expected to render responsively but was not rerun for this new backend/API slice.
needs: Frontend Review Studio can now consume resolveAletheiaReview and listAletheiaReviewDerivedEvalCases when UI ownership is available.
Backend/gate/audit owners should keep this local-only path separate from final export approval and Supabase schema parity until those contracts are explicitly accepted.
